element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Running speed and jump height increase with distance run
Managing 3-5 hit points based on difficulty
Allows aerial navigation and obstacle avoidance
Hidden content requiring exploration of bifurcated paths
Devan Shell encounters with progressive difficulty
Pseudo-3D optional challenge for extra lives
Special mechanics tied to optional content

typical_relief_triggers: Picking up force shields for temporary invincibility
typical_tension_triggers: Timer counting down to final minute
Approaching boss encounters at episode end
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating pressure through countdown timer across entire level; relief cycles driven by item collection and checkpoint reaches; boss encounters provide climactic tension at episode conclusions

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Level bifurcation into subsections; some paths lead to weapon pickups and score items while main direction is hinted with occasional arrows
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Secret level doors marked with question mark signs instead of Devan portrait; accessed in specific areas within levels; must be shot to activate

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of basic movement, jumping momentum mechanics, and primary weapon with abundant health pickups; Easy mode provides 9:59 timer allowance
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of weapon variants (Bouncer, Toaster, RF Missile), hoverboard flight, shield mechanics; Medium mode reduces timer to 8:00
difficulty_curve.late_game: TNT weapons introduced; boss encounters become pattern-dependent; Hard mode (6:00 timer) and Turbo mode (4:00 timer) with on-screen countdown warning
notable_spikes: Boss encounters at end of each episode
Transition from Medium to Hard difficulty modes (significant timer reduction)
Introduction of Flight (Hoverboard) requiring aerial navigation skill
Episodes A, B, C (Lost Episodes) with increased complexity over base six episodes

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level contains an enormous play area with multiple path options; some lead to valuable weapon/item caches while primary progression direction is occasionally hinted with arrows; rewards thorough exploration
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Generic across all levels - Diamondus shown in gameplay documentation

notable_level_patterns.description: Concluding level of each episode features mandatory boss encounter with Devan Shell or his forces; must be defeated to progress; tied to narrative progression
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Final level of each episode (6 episodes in base game)

notable_level_patterns.description: Hidden single-chamber levels accessible via ? mark doors; feature streamlined layout with consolidated weapon/item spawns; completion provides score count-up bonus
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Episode 1 features bird Hip Hop form; Episode C features lizard transformation

notable_level_patterns.description: Optional 3D pseudo-isometric speedway segment triggered by reaching finish with red diamond; time-based collection challenge with obstacles; grants extra life on success
